service_line_config.name: azure
service_line_config.tech_context: This project deploys on Microsoft Azure. Key considerations: - Compute: Azure App Service, Azure Functions, AKS, Container Apps, Virtual Machines - Database: Azure SQL, Cosmos DB, Azure Database for PostgreSQL/MySQL, Azure Cache for Redis - Storage: Blob Storage, Azure Files, Table Storage, Queue Storage - Messaging: Azure Service Bus, Event Hubs, Event Grid, Azure Queue Storage - Networking: Virtual Networks, Application Gateway, Azure Front Door, Private Endpoints - Security: Azure AD / Entra ID, Managed Identity, Key Vault, NSGs, Azure Policy - Monitoring: Azure Monitor, Application Insights, Log Analytics, Azure Alerts - DevOps: Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, Azure Resource Manager (ARM/Bicep), Terraform - AI Services: Azure OpenAI, Cognitive Services, Azure ML

artifact_overrides.module_extraction: Map modules to Azure resource groups or application tiers where applicable. Consider separation by compute, data, integration, and security concerns.
artifact_overrides.functional_req: - Reference specific Azure services for implementation approach - For data requirements, specify Azure SQL vs Cosmos DB vs other data services - For integration requirements, specify Service Bus, Event Grid, or Logic Apps - For authentication, specify Azure AD/Entra ID integration approach
artifact_overrides.nonfunctional_req: - Azure service SLAs and composite availability calculations - Auto-scaling rules and capacity planning (App Service plans, AKS node pools) - Azure region strategy: primary and failover regions - Backup and disaster recovery: geo-redundant storage, SQL geo-replication - Cost management: resource tagging, budget alerts, reserved instances - Security: Managed Identity usage, Key Vault integration, network isolation - Monitoring: Application Insights SLA, alert response time thresholds
artifact_overrides.task: - Infrastructure: ARM/Bicep templates or Terraform modules, resource group setup - Networking: VNet configuration, subnets, NSGs, private endpoints - Compute: App Service/AKS/Function App deployment configuration - Data: database provisioning, connection configuration, migration scripts - Security: Entra ID app registrations, Managed Identity, Key Vault secrets - Integration: Service Bus queues/topics, Event Grid subscriptions, Logic Apps - Monitoring: Application Insights, dashboards, alert rules, log queries - DevOps: CI/CD pipelines, environment provisioning, deployment slots
artifact_overrides.test_case: - Test auto-scaling behavior under simulated load - Test failover scenarios between Azure regions - Test Managed Identity authentication from all services - Test Service Bus message processing with error and dead-letter scenarios - Test network isolation with private endpoint connectivity - Verify Azure Policy compliance across all resource groups
artifact_overrides.architecture: - Azure subscription and resource group topology - Network architecture: VNet design, subnet layout, NSGs, private endpoints - Compute architecture: service selection, scaling strategy, deployment model - Data architecture: database selection, partitioning, caching, replication - Integration architecture: messaging patterns, event-driven flows, API Management - Security architecture: Entra ID, Managed Identity, Key Vault, network security - Monitoring architecture: Application Insights, Log Analytics workspace, alert rules - IaC architecture: ARM/Bicep/Terraform module structure, state management
artifact_overrides.risk_entry: - Azure service outages affecting application availability - Cost overruns from unoptimized resources or unexpected traffic spikes - Entra ID configuration errors causing authentication failures - Data loss from insufficient backup or replication configuration - Network misconfiguration exposing services to public internet - Azure service deprecation requiring migration to replacement services - Terraform/Bicep state drift from manual portal changes
